knownCycleLimitations.reason: Quick Order deactivate->reactivate known limitation: the 2-page area 3 + area 27 NL-mirror fragment does not fully re-bind after a deactivate->reactivate cycle (the page 404s), so the http-body-contains cycle assert fails in the gate's Step 12c cycle leg. Scope: toggle-cycle only; first activation and every first-activation behavior assert are unaffected. A full re-deserialize of the base + this layer restores the page. Inherited verbatim from feature-reordering-pricing 1.1.0.

Quick Order deactivate->reactivate known limitation: same 2-page fragment re-bind gap as the http-body-contains entry — the sku-validation cycle assert (feed GET against the 404'd page) fails in the Step 12c cycle leg. Scope: toggle-cycle only. Inherited verbatim from feature-reordering-pricing 1.1.0.
